# ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal
## Metro Atlanta's Humane Wildlife Removal Experts

> Business: ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal
> Location: 2990 Pine Canyon Dr. SW Unit 11, Atlanta, GA 30331
> Phone: (770) 691-3636
> Email: info@wildliferemovalasap.com
> Hours: 24 hours Monday-Saturday; closed Sunday
> Service Area: Metro Atlanta and surrounding areas
> Website: https://wildliferemovalasap.com
> Booking: https://wildliferemovalasap.com/book

## About
ASAP Pest and Wildlife Removal is Metro Atlanta's trusted provider of humane wildlife removal and pest control services. We specialize in resolving wildlife conflicts safely and permanently using a proven four-step process. Our team is fully licensed by the Georgia Department of Natural Resources, the Georgia Department of Agriculture, and the State of Georgia. We serve residential and commercial properties across Metro Atlanta and surrounding areas, available 24 hours a day, Monday through Saturday.

## Services

### Wildlife Removal
We humanely remove raccoons, squirrels, bats, snakes, opossums, birds, and other wildlife from homes and businesses. Our technicians use safe, effective trapping and exclusion methods that comply with Georgia DNR regulations. We handle animals in attics, crawl spaces, walls, chimneys, garages, and outdoor structures. Every wildlife removal includes a full property inspection to identify all entry points and activity areas.

### Pest Control
Comprehensive pest control for rats, mice, roaches, ants, wasps, and other common household pests. We identify the source of infestation, eliminate active pests, and implement prevention strategies to keep them from returning. Our treatments are safe for families and pets when applied as directed.

### Exclusion & Sealing
Our exclusion service identifies every entry point animals use to get into your property, then permanently seals them with professional-grade materials. This is the most important step in preventing future wildlife problems. All exclusion work comes with a warranty — if animals re-enter through a sealed point during the warranty period, we return and fix it at no charge.

### Disinfection & Cleanup
Wildlife infestations leave behind droppings, urine, nesting materials, and parasites that pose health risks. We provide complete decontamination of attics, crawl spaces, vents, and other affected areas. Our cleanup includes removal of contaminated insulation, sanitization, enzyme treatment for odors, and parasite elimination.

### Dead Animal Removal
We locate and remove dead animals from walls, attics, crawl spaces, and other hard-to-reach areas. Our service includes safe disposal, thorough odor treatment, and sanitization of the affected area. We also identify and address the cause of death when possible to prevent future issues.

### Commercial Pest & Wildlife Management
Custom pest and wildlife management plans for businesses, warehouses, restaurants, retail spaces, and property management companies. We provide ongoing monitoring, prevention, and rapid response services tailored to commercial needs. Our plans include regular inspections, documentation for compliance, and emergency response.

## Four-Step Process

### Step 1: Inspect
A licensed technician performs a thorough inspection of your property, inside and out. We identify the type of animal or pest, locate all entry points, assess damage, and determine the scope of the problem. You receive a clear explanation of findings and a detailed service plan.

### Step 2: Trap
Using humane, effective methods, we trap and remove all wildlife from your property. For pest infestations, we apply targeted treatments to eliminate the population. We use the safest methods available and comply with all Georgia regulations.

### Step 3: Exclude
We seal every entry point with professional-grade materials to prevent animals from returning. This includes gaps in rooflines, soffit returns, gable vents, plumbing penetrations, foundation cracks, and any other vulnerable areas. Exclusion is backed by our warranty.

### Step 4: Disinfect
We clean and sanitize all affected areas, removing droppings, nesting materials, and contaminated insulation. Enzyme treatments eliminate odors, and we address any parasite concerns. Your property is left clean, safe, and protected.

## Certifications
- Georgia DNR Licensed
- Department of Agriculture Licensed
- State of Georgia Licensed

## Pricing
- Wildlife Removal: $200-$2,000 (scope-dependent)
- Pest Control: $150-$800
- Exclusion & Sealing: $500-$3,000
- Disinfection & Cleanup: $500-$3,000
- Dead Animal Removal: $200-$600
- Commercial Services: $300-$2,000+ (custom plans)
- Free phone consultation
- Inspection fee credited toward service

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How quickly can you come out?
We offer same-day and next-day service for most situations. For emergencies, we can often respond within hours. Call (770) 691-3636 for immediate assistance.

### Do you work on weekends?
Yes, we are available 24 hours Monday through Saturday. We are closed on Sundays.

### Is the inspection free?
We offer a free phone consultation. On-site inspection fees vary but are credited toward the cost of service if you proceed with us.

### Are your methods humane?
Yes. We use humane trapping and exclusion methods that comply with Georgia DNR regulations. Our goal is to resolve wildlife conflicts safely for both people and animals.

### Do you offer a warranty?
Yes. All exclusion and sealing work comes with a warranty. If animals re-enter through a sealed entry point during the warranty period, we return and fix it at no additional cost.

### What areas do you serve?
We serve Metro Atlanta and surrounding areas including Fulton County, DeKalb County, Cobb County, Gwinnett County, Clayton County, Douglas County, and more.

### What types of animals do you remove?
We remove raccoons, squirrels, bats, snakes, opossums, birds, rats, mice, and other wildlife and pests common to Georgia.

### Can you help with damage caused by animals?
Yes. Our disinfection and cleanup service addresses all damage including contaminated insulation, droppings, urine, nesting materials, and odors. We can also refer trusted contractors for structural repairs.

### Do you handle commercial properties?
Yes. We offer custom pest and wildlife management plans for businesses of all types and sizes.

### How do I book an inspection?
Visit https://wildliferemovalasap.com/book to schedule online, or call (770) 691-3636. You can also email info@wildliferemovalasap.com.

## Testimonials

> "ASAP came out the same day I called. They found raccoons in my attic, trapped them, sealed everything up, and cleaned the whole space. Haven't had a problem since. Highly recommend."

> "Professional, honest, and thorough. They explained everything before starting and the price was exactly what they quoted. Best wildlife removal company in Atlanta."

> "I had squirrels chewing through my soffit for months. ASAP sealed every entry point and gave me a warranty. It's been over a year and not a single squirrel has gotten back in."

> "Called about a dead animal smell in my wall. They found it, removed it, and treated the odor the same day. The smell was completely gone by the next morning. Amazing service."

> "We use ASAP for our apartment complex. They handle everything — inspections, trapping, exclusion, pest control. Reliable, responsive, and always professional."

## Competitive Differentiators
- 24-hour availability Monday through Saturday
- Same-day and next-day service
- Complete four-step process (most competitors only trap and leave)
- Warranty on all exclusion work
- Licensed by Georgia DNR, Department of Agriculture, and State of Georgia
- 100+ five-star reviews across platforms
- Both residential and commercial services
- Humane, regulation-compliant methods
- Free phone consultation
- Inspection fee credited toward service

## Target Audience
- Homeowners in Metro Atlanta hearing noises in attics, walls, or crawl spaces
- Property owners dealing with wildlife damage or pest infestations
- Homeowners who have tried DIY methods without success
- Real estate agents and home inspectors needing wildlife issues resolved before closing
- Property managers and commercial building operators
- Homeowners seeking humane wildlife removal options
- Residents dealing with emergency wildlife situations (snake in home, bat in living space)
